title: Team member closeout: Hearthlit PR 108 Sonar evidence fetch complete
body: Team member closeout: Boundary owned: read-only PR 108 Sonar and GitHub evidence fetch under Hearthlit Brazing Magma / codex / GPT-5 / 019e5a. Outcome: initial live snapshot at PR head 50f8ba41 showed SonarCloud Code Analysis failed only on new_duplicated_lines_density 5.7 percent over 3 percent, with new_violations 0 and new_security_hotspots_reviewed 100 percent. Handoff refresh found the state superseded: PR 108 is MERGED at 2026-05-24T20:06:12Z via merge commit 2462952a, Sonar PR analysis for 58feff48 at 2026-05-24T15:49:14Z is OK, new_duplicated_lines_density 0.0, new_violations 0, new_security_hotspots_reviewed 100 percent. Evidence: gh pr view 108, SonarCloud project_status pullRequest=108, SonarCloud project_pull_requests list. Claims / queue / git state: no Hearthlit active claims, active commit queue empty, no source edits; napkin capture appended for the stale-snapshot closeout hazard. Surprise: PR/Sonar state changed during closeout, so the earlier red snapshot must not be treated as current. Blockers or risks: none from this boundary. Handoff needed: none for PR 108 Sonar; broader dirty tree and active lanes remain owned by their existing agents.
